error[E0597]: `s2_rc` does not live long enough
  --> benchmark_results/2026-05-10T00-24-35/gpt-5.2-codex/declarations/tags_2/sample_001/target.rs:30:9
   |
29 |         let s2_rc = a.borrow().s2p.as_ref().unwrap().clone();
   |             ----- binding `s2_rc` declared here
30 |         s2_rc.borrow().v2
   |         ^^^^^---------
   |         |
   |         borrowed value does not live long enough
   |         a temporary with access to the borrow is created here ...
31 |     };
   |     -- ... and the borrow might be used here, when that temporary is dropped and runs the destructor for type `Ref<'_, S2>`
   |     |
   |     `s2_rc` dropped here while still borrowed
   |
   = note: the temporary is part of an expression at the end of a block;
           consider forcing this temporary to be dropped sooner, before the block's local variables are dropped
help: for example, you could save the expression's value in a new local variable `x` and then make `x` be the expression at the end of the block
   |
30 |         let x = s2_rc.borrow().v2; x
   |         +++++++                  +++
